declarations.description: Tailwind @layer block declaration — defines custom styles within a specific Tailwind layer.
Tailwind @apply rule — applies utility classes inline within a custom CSS rule.
Tailwind directive — injects a layer of generated Tailwind styles into the stylesheet.
Tailwind @config directive — specifies the configuration file path for this stylesheet.
Custom CSS class that uses @apply to compose Tailwind utilities.
Legacy Tailwind @responsive directive — generates responsive variants of contained utilities.
Legacy Tailwind @variants directive — generates state variants for contained utilities.
Tailwind plugin API — registers new utility classes via the plugin system.
Tailwind plugin API — registers new component classes via the plugin system.
Tailwind plugin API — registers dynamic utilities that accept arbitrary values.
Tailwind plugin API — registers dynamic component classes that accept arbitrary values.
Tailwind plugin API — registers base layer styles (global defaults, resets).
Tailwind plugin API — registers a custom variant (modifier prefix).
Tailwind plugin API — registers a dynamic variant that accepts arbitrary values.
Tailwind @screen directive — wraps rules in a responsive breakpoint media query.
Tailwind @source directive — specifies additional content source paths for class detection.
Tailwind @plugin directive — loads a Tailwind plugin by path or package name.
CSS @keyframes declaration used with Tailwind animation utilities.
Tailwind config content paths — glob patterns for scanning class names.
Tailwind config screens — responsive breakpoint definitions.
Tailwind config prefix — class name prefix for all generated utilities.
Tailwind config theme extend block — extends the default theme with custom values.
